title: Direct reply — triage decides no research is needed
description: The pipeline's shortest path: triage classifies the ask as answerable from model knowledge and streams a direct reply with no search wave. Web search is left ON so the point proves triage — not the knob — chose to skip it.

points.label: Direct reply: no search wave fires
points.summary: A plain factual ask should stream a direct answer; the activity trail should show a 'Direct reply (no research needed)' plan step and NO search step. If it runs a web search anyway, that is a triage failure — report it.

actions.text: What is the capital of Australia?

points.label: Direct reply: conversational follow-up stays direct
points.summary: A short chit-chat / definitional ask should also answer directly without searching. Confirms triage doesn't over-trigger research on trivial turns.

actions.text: In one sentence, what does 'idempotent' mean?
